case_title: MARYCATHRY VILLARICO et al VS. JAMES CLAIBORNE DAVOL

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT DAVOL, JAMES CLAIBORNE HEARING SET FOR DEC-03-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY JAMES CLAIBORNE DAVOL IS GRANTED.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,826.68 FILED BY VILLARICO, MARYCATHRY VILLARICO, MARILOU AS TO DEFENDANT DAVOL, JAMES CLAIBORNE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2012 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
